what_it_does: This file is a JSON array that lists six preview HTML assets for the claude-ds project, each with a relative path and an absolute filesystem root, acting as a batch allocation record for interpretive processing.
observations: All entries share project 'claude-ds' and root '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds'
Every path is under the 'preview/' directory and ends with '.html'
The listed files are brand_process_flow.html, brand_shapes.html, brand_vi.html, brand_voice.html, brand_wordmark.html, and colors_bronze.html
No code symbols are present; symbols is empty
The file sits at wave-002/alloc/batch-029.json, suggesting it is one allocation batch in a wave
standouts: All entries are brand/visual-identity preview HTML pages
Five files follow a 'brand_*.html' naming pattern while one is 'colors_bronze.html'
Uniform project and root across all entries
concerns: The absolute root path '/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds' is environment-specific and may not be portable
There is no explicit field explaining why these six files are grouped together in batch-029
notes: A batch allocation manifest pointing to six claude-ds preview HTML brand and color guide files for interpretive ledger processing.
questions: Why were these six specific preview files selected for batch-029?
Are these files inputs to be interpreted, outputs already generated, or tasks to be assigned?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the file acts as a batch allocation manifest listing preview HTML assets with their locations.
intention_signals: It appears to enumerate a curated set of claude-ds preview HTML design artifacts so they can be located and processed by an interpretive or fusion layer.
novelty: All listed assets are HTML preview pages rather than source code modules, and the batch contains no extractable code symbols.
contribution: Provides a scoped, self-contained inventory of claude-ds preview HTML assets with their filesystem roots, giving downstream interpretation a clear list of files to locate and process.
summary_for_embedding: batch-029.json is a JSON array of six claude-ds project entries mapping preview HTML brand and color guide files to their absolute filesystem root.
intention_for_embedding: This file was intended to allocate a specific set of claude-ds preview HTML design artifacts to an interpretive processing wave.
